title: Spatti
compiled_truth: Spatti is an external contact at [Ensr](companies/ensr). Over the corpus period (2001-08-22 to 2001-10-15), Spatti sent 18 and received 8 emails, totalling 26 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Shafer](people/john-shafer) (14), [Larry Campbell](people/larry-campbell) (11), [Kevin Hyatt](people/kevin-hyatt) (11), [Eric Gadd](people/eric-gadd) (10), [Doug Cebryk](people/doug-cebryk) (10).
